recommendations.title: Toto, Peppino, and the Hussy
recommendations.overview: Antonio, Peppino and Lucia are three brothers who live in the country near Naples. Lucia's son, Gianni, goes to Naples to study medicine, but there he knows a ballet dancer. They fall in love and, when she goes to Milan, Gianni follows her. Informed

recommendations.title: Gomorrah
recommendations.overview: An inside look at Italy's modern-day crime families, the Camorra in Naples and Caserta. Based on a book by Roberto Saviano. Power, money and blood: these are the "values" that the residents of the Province of Naples and Caserta have to face every day

recommendations.title: Ciao, Professore!
recommendations.overview: A bureaucratic snafu sends Marco Tullio Sperelli, a portly, middle-aged northern Italian, to teach third grade in a poor town outside Naples

recommendations.title: Things to Come
recommendations.overview: Nathalie teaches philosophy at a high school in Paris. She is passionate about her job and particularly enjoys passing on the pleasure of thinking. Married with two children, she divides her time between her family, former students and her very posse

recommendations.title: Conversation Piece
recommendations.overview: A retired professor of American origin lives a solitary life in a luxurious palazzo in Rome. He is confronted by a vulgar Italian marchesa and her lover, her daughter and her daughter's boyfriend, and forced to rent to them an apartment on the upper

recommendations.title: White Wedding
recommendations.overview: A philosophy professor has an illicit affair with one of his students, a bright yet troubled girl who lives alone.

recommendations.title: Irrational Man
recommendations.overview: On a small town college campus, a philosophy professor in existential crisis gives his life new purpose when he enters into a relationship with his student.

recommendations.title: The Hawks and the Sparrows
recommendations.overview: A man and his son take an allegorical stroll through life with a talking bird that spouts social and political philosophy.

recommendations.title: The Swimmer
recommendations.overview: A man spends a summer day swimming home via all the pools in his quiet suburban neighborhood.

recommendations.title: La Notte
recommendations.overview: A day in the life of an unfaithful married couple and their steadily deteriorating relationship in Milan.
